title: Uruguayan Pine Nut Stir Fry
description: A savory and crunchy Uruguayan-inspired stir fry featuring pine nuts and savory flavors. Prepare to be delighted by the combination of textures and tastes in this quick and easy recipe.
instructions: Heat the sesame oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the cozy vegetables and stir-fry until they are tender-crisp.
Add the pine nuts and stir-fry for an additional 2 minutes.
In a small bowl, whisk together the sour soy sauce and Uruguayan seasoning.
Pour the sauce over the vegetables and nuts, and stir-fry for 1-2 minutes.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Serve hot over rice or noodles, garnished with additional pine nuts if desired.
